channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Raw sewage leaking onto a public footpath from number 12 orchard road, 12th April
item.description:
Issue been going on for 3 weeks. Owner told. Busy street with school child who will be walking through raw sewage once they return to school next week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Out of control rubbish., 12th April
item.description:
Why can’t folks manage their rubbish???Education is needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Brunswick Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti-Fly Posting Sign Faded, 12th April
item.description:
No suitable category to report faded LBB signs!! Location: Ridley Road alley onto Anthony Road pavement Note: This is a LBB sign post and sign - not L&Q. Similar to the one replaced on the Darenth Road end!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anthony Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags full of stuff on pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Bin bags left on pavement in the way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heron Hill, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norman Park - Litter around River Ravensbourne area, 12th April
item.description:
Please can you conduct a thorough litter-pick around the River Ravensbourne running through Norman Park. Photo shows area that needs attention. Litter needs removing from: River banks, In river itself, Around both bridges, Around benches/tables, Within undergrowth, Trees etc on all sides of river, On grass areas. This will require a little dexterity to reach some of the litter. Imagery is a selection of litter, not all of it is in plain sight. It would be appreciated if this request is carried out properly the first time of asking. Thanks in advance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Common, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dressing table, lamp, rubbish dumped on pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish appeared overnight

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oaklands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norman Park - Litter, 12th April
item.description:
See photo, lots of litter on grass by path, pls clear. Https://w3w.co/notion.truth.jabs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Theres a firemans key seems to be stuck in the firekey hole, 12th April
item.description:
Noticed a firemans key is stuck in the key-hole in the entrance of the flat, coulld pose a risk if firemen can't get into the building quickly in case of fire.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Acacia Grove, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes dumped on grass by litter bin, 12th April
item.description:
Boxes dumped on grass by litter bin , wind blowing contents everywhere making area messy
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria Road outside at end of the road by Salusbury 136 and 171 at end sweep, 12th April
item.description:
Sweep following busy Sunday in Salusbury Road.. Detrious and litter in Victoria Road Please sweep 30 metres? into Victoria 136 and 169 opposite each other

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Office desk on Pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Location: Linton Close pavement next to road Brown office desk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
See photos. Rubbish on Grass by fence to left of entrance to NPCSC. Https://w3w.co/stands.papers.policy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame, carpet and toys , side of Boots Opticians, 12th April
item.description:
Been there for at least a couple of weeks and it’s being added to regularly. Is a trip hazard and is partially blocking pavement and making the area unsightly. Edmund Road, side of Boots Opticians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edmund Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linton Close Electrical Wiring, 12th April
item.description:
Location: Linton Close Alley near to Anthony Road. Outside number 5/6. Electrical wires and cables

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 12th April
item.description:
There is a big patch of broken glass in the road and on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Borland Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria Road outside 128 damaged pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Cracked and sunken pavement Trip hazard Requires repair Ta

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping whole bed and mattress dumped outside property, ACTION REQUIRED IMMEDIATELY, 12th April
item.description:
Last week was left rubbish and even a duvet with urine on at the same point, this week it is a whole bed and a filthy mattress. Hackney Council we had enough! CCTV must be checked on this street to find out who is the responsible of this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 12th April
item.description:
Someone has dump a pallet and DIY waste outside 25 Church Hill Wood which is by the R3 bus top

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Church Hill Wood, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyre on Ridley Road, 12th April
item.description:
Location: Ridley Road pavement next to Anthony Road junction Black tyre (zoom in!)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anthony Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria Road near junction with Honiton pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Cracked and sunken pavement - trip risk Requires repair Ta

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London
